name: QA 580
description:
PCP QA Test No. 580

Compare pmGetInDom and pmNameIndom for instance names containing spaces

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 580.out.bad)
7c7
< pm*InDom: inst=[1] iname=<ONE init> reverse lookup: inst=[1]
---
> pm*InDom: inst=[1] iname=<ONE /usr/bin/systemd> reverse lookup: inst=[1]
9c9
<    [1] <ONE init>
---
>    [1] <ONE /usr/bin/systemd>
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 112a54a217ba -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 112a54a217ba -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 112a54a217ba -f simple.numfetch
